query:
(_index=sumologic_audit _sourceCategory=SCHEDULED_SEARCH) 
| parse "*[" as message
| keyvalue regex "=([^\]]*)\]" "Name","AlertType","Destination","StatusCode"  nodrop
| where action not in ("UPDATE","START","DELETE","FINISH","CREATE") and message !="Scheduled search alert triggered "
| count by action, message
| sort by action,_count

sources.file: apps/monitors/Alert Tuning - Monitor or Schedule Search.json
sources.dashboardName: Alert Tuning - Monitor and Scheduled Searches
